reasoning: The document suffers from significant content loss, with a shingling recall of 0.67 corroborating the LLM's identification of missing financial figures and names. Furthermore, the structural failure of the topic-to-presenter grid in the second half of the document destroys the logical association of the data, rendering it functionally inaccessible and requiring manual reconstruction.

concerns.description: Significant text omission within a section
concerns.analysis: The output document suffers from significant text omissions across several critical sections. Specifically: 1) The financial details (Fund Balance and Disbursement figures) for items 4b (NG 911 Fund), 4c (CMRS Fund), 4d (PSAP Fund), and 4e (Grant Fund) are entirely missing. 2) The names of the peer reviewers under item 4g (i-v) are missing. 3) The detailed sub-items for the Executive Director Report (item 5, sub-items a-f) are entirely absent. concerns.source_pdf_quote: PDF Page 1, Item 4b: 'NG 911 Fund November 2018 Fund Balance $27,867,858...'. PDF Page 2: '6. Education Committee Report Mike Reitz'.
concerns.output_quote: The HTML bulleted list for Item 4 only contains 'b) NG 911 Fund' without any associated figures. Below the image, the HTML lists '6. Education Committee Report' through '13. Other', followed by a completely separate block of names starting with 'Mike Reitz'.

concerns.analysis: The second half of the agenda (items 6-13) is visually presented as a two-column table/grid in the source PDF, pairing topics with presenters. In the HTML output, this structure is broken. The content is rendered as two distinct vertical lists: a list of committee reports/topics followed by a list of names. This renders the 'table' data incomprehensible as the row-level association is lost.
